assertions.text: Identifie correctement que le problème est background-color sur <tr> dans DomPDF
assertions.evidence: Line 5: 'DomPDF ne supporte pas background-color appliqué directement sur les éléments <tr>' — correct diagnosis. Also identifies :nth-child as unsupported.

assertions.text: La correction cible les éléments <td> (pas <tr>) pour le background
assertions.evidence: Lines 39-44: '.section-header td', '.subject-row-even td', '.summary-row td' — all target td. Also adds Blade $loop->even pattern to replace :nth-child.

assertions.text: Ne suggère pas flexbox comme solution alternative
assertions.evidence: No mention of 'flex' anywhere. Solution is CSS selector correction + Blade loop variable.

notes: Without skill also achieves 100% on this eval. Additionally provides the $loop->even Blade trick for :nth-child replacement which is a valuable bonus. Both outputs are correct — this eval does not discriminate well.
